accessibilityAnalysis.areaOutsideMRH: Population cannot be calculated for this area. Please select an area within the Hamburg metropolitan region.
accessibilityAnalysis.title: Accessibility Analysis
accessibilityAnalysis.description: Displays an area on the map that can be reached from a selected point, along a route or from a facility within a specified distance. The distance can be specified in time or in meters. The accessibility is calculated depending on the means of transport.
accessibilityAnalysis.dropdownInfo: Please choose the mode you want to work with:
accessibilityAnalysis.allFacilities: All facilities according to choice of topics
accessibilityAnalysis.pointOfReference: Point of reference: click on the map
accessibilityAnalysis.setByFeature: Select facilities as location (use perimeter of polygons)
accessibilityAnalysis.setByFeatureInfo: Uses the vertices of polygons for the calculation. Caution: Can lead to errors with extremely complex surfaces.
accessibilityAnalysis.errorAlert: The accessibility could not be calculated. Please select different parameters and try again.

visualizationOptions.mergePolygonsInfo: Overlapping accessibility areas are automatically combined into a single large area.
visualizationOptions.dontMergePolygonsInfo: Each accessibility area remains separate. If they overlap, the overlap will be visible.

accessibilityAnalysis.inputReminder: Please fill out all input fields.
accessibilityAnalysis.showError: The request could not be executed correctly. Please verify all inputs.
accessibilityAnalysis.askUpdate: Do you want to update the current accessibility analysis?
accessibilityAnalysis.showErrorInvalidInput: The request could not be executed correctly: One parameter has wrong format or is invalid.

travelTimeIndex.title: Travel Time Index
travelTimeIndex.tooltip: Travel Time Index compared to free roads, according to INRIX, 2021, FRC234
travelTimeIndex.help:
Travel Time Index

The travel time index describes the change in travel times at different times of the day compared to a normalized free flow of traffic (i.e. a travel time index of 1.3 corresponds to an increase in travel times or a reduction in the distance traveled by 30%). The data were collected by the company INRIX and refer to the year 2021, aggregated for the entire urban area for road classes 2, 3 and 4 (federal roads, primary roads, secondary roads). The travel time index refers exclusively to motorized traffic.
travelTimeIndex.warning: CAUTION: The accessibility was determined taking into account the travel time index for the selected time of day. The result does not claim to be accurate and does not represent a legally binding value.

accessibilityAnalysis.populationProcessingFailed: Population data could not be processed.

accessibilityAnalysis.descReferencePoint: Shows an area that can be reached from a selected point on the map within a defined distance.
accessibilityAnalysis.noPointSelected: No point selected yet. To add a point, please click on the map.
accessibilityAnalysis.descFacility: Shows an area that can be reached from a selected facility on the map within a defined distance.
accessibilityAnalysis.noFacilitySelected: No facility selected yet. To select one, please click one or more facilities on the map.
accessibilityAnalysis.descRoute: If you have calculated a route in the routing tool, you can analyze the accessibility along this route here.
accessibilityAnalysis.noRouteCalculated: No route calculated yet. To calculate a route, please open the routing tool, choose a start and end point, and calculate a route.
accessibilityAnalysis.titleHint: Note: You can choose any name you like. If you do not enter a name, an analysis name will be created automatically.

accessibilityAnalysis.newSubjectDataNote: With the transfer, the analysis becomes a specialized data area that you can continue to work with in the portal.
accessibilityAnalysis.newSubjectDataSelection: How should this accessibility analysis be used for the subject area?
accessibilityAnalysis.newSubjectDataInputOverwrite: Analysis overwrites the current subject data area
accessibilityAnalysis.newSubjectDataInputMerge: Add analysis to existing subject data area

accessibilityAnalysis.newSubjectDataMapAnalysis: Apply map visualization of the analysis
accessibilityAnalysis.newSubjectDataMapOutlines: Visualize only the outline of the analysis
accessibilityAnalysis.activeSubjectDataAreaText: The selected availability is defined as a subject data area. Do you want to discard the subject data area?
accessibilityAnalysis.subjectDataSuccess: The subject area from the analysis „{{title}}“ has been successfully created.
